burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; substantial discomfort and QOL impact

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical evaluation with anoscopy; rule out other causes of rectal bleeding

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with conservative measures and outpatient procedures

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care with access to specialist proctology when needed
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Fiber, topical treatments, rubber band ligation; hemorrhoidectomy for severe cases
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access disparities across regions and patient reluctance to seek care
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Wide availability of outpatient procedures and surgical care
